event.name: F1 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix 2026 — Championship Decider
event.competition: Formula 1 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix (Championship finale)

context.home_team: Championship leader (8-point lead, must finish P2 or higher if rival wins)
context.away_team: Championship rival (must win and hope leader finishes outside P2)
context.pre_match_notes: Championship decider. Leader qualified P1. Rival P2. Narrative pressure maximum on both drivers. Yas Marina: medium-speed, overtaking possible. Leader's 8-point lead means P2 finish secures title even if rival wins. Pressure asymmetry: rival must win AND result goes right; leader has margin.

question: Does the pressure asymmetry between a leader with a points cushion and a rival who must win affect the qualifying delta signal?

verified_outcome.score: Rival won race but leader finished P3 — leader won championship
verified_outcome.key_variable: pressure_asymmetry_modifier — rival had maximum motivation; leader conservative (P3 was enough for title)
